rationale: Both correctly diagnose the root cause as a run-level mismatch (core_model dummy-weight injection via _add_dummy_load_format, extended to online serving by PR #4354) and give the identical fix (--run-level=full_model), matching akshatvishu/yenuo26's actual resolution. X undermines itself by setting disposition to 'keep-open' while its own body argues the issue is invalid — directly contradicting the actual 'closed as invalid' outcome. Y explicitly states 'invalid is the correct resolution' and 'Keep it closed as invalid,' matching the thread exactly, and backs the diagnosis with more precise, varied line citations (run_args.py, runtime.py, stage_config.py, assertions.py) plus an explanation of the audio-side gibberish that X omits.
